changelog:
Production-readiness Phase 1 — security & reliability hardening:
- Constant-time compare for admin password and API key (crypto/subtle); previous '!=' compare leaked timing info.
- Refuse to start when admin password is still the default 'changeme' (override with KIRO_ALLOW_DEFAULT_PASSWORD=1).
- http.Server with explicit timeouts: ReadHeaderTimeout 10s (Slowloris guard), WriteTimeout 30m (long streams), IdleTimeout 120s.
- Graceful shutdown on SIGINT / SIGTERM: drains in-flight requests via srv.Shutdown(30s), closes background goroutines, flushes stats once more.
- Atomic config save (temp file + fsync + rename) so a crash mid-write cannot leave config.json truncated.
- Background quota refresh tightened from 30 min to 5 min, plus per-account debounced lazy refresh fired ~30s after each request completion (dashboard quota numbers stay current without hammering Kiro).
- Dockerfile hardening: pinned alpine:3.19 (was alpine:latest), runs as uid 1000 (USER 1000:1000), HEALTHCHECK wired to /health, tini as PID 1 for signal forwarding, build flags trimpath + ldflags for smaller reproducible binary.
- New installs default the three prompt-filter toggles (FilterClaudeCode / FilterEnvNoise / FilterStripBoundaries) to true so a fresh deployment Just Works for Claude Code. Existing configs are untouched.

A5: drop Claude Code system prompt entirely when detected.
A4: remove ThinkingModePrompt; split applyPromptFilters into system + user variants; minimalFallbackUserContent ''.
A3: drop --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- markers; drop 'Tool results:' prose envelope; tighten detector.
A2: kiro-go-patch container_name + pull_policy: always.
A1: <system-reminder>/x-anthropic-billing-header strip; /v1/responses endpoint; model id echo; dashboard refresh.
